title: FrankenPress snapshot manifest (v2)
description: fp.snapshot/v2 — adapter-scoped, WXR-based snapshot manifest. Replaces v1 (SQL-dump-based, full-replace apply) with an additive shape that's safe to run against live sites. Pairs with frankenpress/mu-plugin v0.8.0's wp fp snapshot/apply.

id.description: Snapshot identifier: <slug>-<UTC-stamp>. Used as the idempotency key on the apply side (wp_options.fp_snapshot_applied_ref).

created.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the snapshot was captured at.

site_url.description: home_url() at capture time. Apply side runs `wp search-replace <this> <target>`.

adapters_fired.description: Adapter names that fired during capture. Apply dispatches to post_apply() per entry.

scope.description: The declarative blast radius of the snapshot — the union of every fired adapter's SnapshotScope. Apply will never touch anything outside this scope.

post_types_with_marker.description: Map of post_type → required postmeta key. Only posts matching both go into the WXR.

post_types_full_capture.description: Post types where every row is captured (e.g. nav_menu_item, wp_template).

option_patterns.description: MySQL LIKE patterns for wp_options.option_name. Matched options go into options.json.

theme_mods_for.description: Stylesheet slugs whose theme_mods_<slug> are captured.

documented_exclusions.description: Documentation-only list of tables / row patterns this snapshot's scope intentionally never touches. Surfaced in PR review.
